name: Drowned Innocence
acquisitionSource: Clear Psyche Deepdive: No More the Shore
descriptionTemplate: Choose an Awakener to gain [Arg1] Aliemus, while other Awakeners gain [Arg2] Aliemus. Vortice: Immediately unleash {Vortex! Shell!} as a {Pursuit}.
lore:
She plunged into the icy sea without hesitation, fully aware that the vortex would claim her life.
Because in her pure, innocent mind, this was the only way to save her friends.
